tagline: 30 Years of 5-Star Tree Care in Greater Boston
hero_subtitle: Massachusetts Certified Arborists delivering precision tree care with 120-foot cranes and decades of expertise.
service_area_description: Serving Needham, Newton, Brookline, Wellesley, Weston, Westwood, Dedham, Milton & Greater Boston.
seo_title: Boston Tree Company | Certified Arborists in Needham, MA
seo_description: Boston Tree Company — 30+ years of expert tree removal, pruning, crane services, and emergency tree care in Greater Boston. Fully licensed and insured.
services_subtitle: Full-spectrum tree care backed by certified arborists and heavy-duty equipment.
reviews_subtitle: Trusted by homeowners and property managers across Greater Boston for over three decades.
cta_heading: That tree isn't going to handle itself.
cta_subtitle: Get a transparent, no-obligation quote from a certified arborist within 24 hours.
footer_description: Massachusetts Certified Arborists proudly serving Greater Boston since 1993.

services_featured.name: Tree Removal
services_featured.description: Safe, efficient removal of hazardous, dead, or unwanted trees — including tight-access jobs using our 120-ft crane.

services_featured.name: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services_featured.description: Structural pruning and canopy shaping to promote health, safety, and curb appeal.

services_secondary.name: Crane Tree Services
services_secondary.description: 120-foot boom crane for large-scale removals and hard-to-reach trees — no yard damage.

services_secondary.name: Tree Health Inspections
services_secondary.description: Comprehensive health assessments by certified arborists to catch disease early.

services_accent.name: 24/7 Emergency Service
services_accent.description: Rapid storm damage response — call us anytime for emergency tree removal.

services_wide.name: Professional Consultations
services_wide.description: Expert arborist advice on tree preservation, risk assessment, and landscape planning.

about_features.title: MA Certified Arborists
about_features.description: Every job is supervised by a Massachusetts Certified Arborist with decades of field experience.

about_features.title: Heavy-Duty Equipment
about_features.description: 120-foot cranes, 65-foot bucket trucks, and commercial chippers — all in-house, never subcontracted.

about_features.title: Safety-First Culture
about_features.description: Fully licensed and insured with a 30-year safety record. Member of the Massachusetts Arborist Association.

reviews.name: Karen T.
reviews.text: They brought a crane and removed a massive oak over our house without a scratch on anything. Incredible skill.

reviews.name: Michael D.
reviews.text: Boston Tree has maintained our property for 15 years. Always professional, always on time, always excellent.

reviews.name: Jennifer S.
reviews.text: Storm knocked a tree onto our driveway at midnight. They were there by 7 AM and had it cleared by noon.
